name: systeme.io
description: All-in-one marketing platform for funnels, email, memberships, and online courses.

auth_methods.note: Documentation specifies use of API key in Authorization header as a Bearer token and allows api_key query parameter for some endpoints.

credential_access.note: Help Center states API is available for Growth and higher plans, so a paid plan upgrade is required to obtain API access; generating the key is self-serve from the dashboard once on an eligible plan.

api_surface.note: Developer portal lists REST API docs and multiple endpoints (Authentication, Endpoints, Webhooks, SDKs). The API covers core product objects (funnels, emails, contacts), per developer docs and portal.

buildability.note: Public REST docs exist and API keys are generated from the dashboard, but API access requires upgrading to Growth or higher, so development is possible after routine paid plan upgrade.

queries: systeme.io how to get api key
